# AI-RISA Stable Boundaries (Do Not Edit)

The following files are closed fault domains and must not be edited unless a proven regression points directly at them:

- run_single_fight_premium_report.py
- ai_risa_models.py
- ai_risa_prediction_adapter.py

**Rule:**
- No speculative edits.
- Only touch if a real, file-backed regression is confirmed.
